title: IAFCE - XaeroMap Support
description: IAFCE entity icons support for Xaero's Map
body:
# IAFCE - XaeroMap Support

This resource pack add entity icons in I&F CE's mobs for Xaero's Map

Currently all textures are from [Xaero's Minimap - Modded Support](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/xaeros-minimap-modded-support) under MIT license, but in future we will remake all of them.

## Required mods

- IceAndFire Community Edition
- Xaero's Minimap
- Xaero's World Map (Optional)
